title: SystemVerilog support assignment patters under FUNCREFs

features.name: function call with assignment pattern argument
features.description: Code should include a function call that receives an assignment pattern as an argument

features.name: nested assignment pattern in function argument
features.description: Code should include nested assignment patterns passed to a function call, where inner patterns use concantenation with literals
features.snippet: function_name('{ feature : { 6'd0, param1, param2 }, version : const_ref.version });
